dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8505 IH: Veterinary Education Equity Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Figures (for himself, Mr. Thompson of Mississippi, Mrs. Beatty, and Ms. Sewell) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the National Agricultural Research, Extension, and Teaching Policy Act of 1977 to make improvements to the veterinary services grant program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Veterinary Education Equity Act.
Section 1415B of the National Agricultural Research, Extension, and Teaching Policy Act of 1977 (7 U.S.C. 3151b) is amended—

subparagraph.text: in subparagraph (F), by striking or at the end;
in subparagraph (G), by striking the period at the end and inserting ; or; and
by adding at the end the following:
1890 Institutions, as defined in section 2 of the Agricultural Research, Extension, and Education Reform Act of 1998 (7 U.S.C. 7601).

paragraph.text: in subsection (c), by adding at the end the following:
In making grants under the program under subsection (b), the Secretary shall provide a higher priority to projects at 1890 Institutions.
